Chapter 3 Exercise Find the values of \[ (1 + 2i)^3, \quad \frac{5}{-3 + 4i}, \quad \left( \frac{2 + i}{3 - 2i} \right)^2, \quad (1 + i)^n + (1 - i)^n.\] If \(z = x + iy\) (where \(x\) and \(y\) are real numbers), find the real and imaginary parts of: \[z^4, \quad \frac{1}{z}, \quad \frac{z - 1}{z + 1}, \quad \frac{1}{z^2}.\] Show that: \[ \left( \frac{-1 \pm i\sqrt{3}}{2} \right)^3 = 1 \quad \text{and} \quad \left( \frac{\pm 1 \pm i\sqrt{3}}{2} \right)^6 = 1\] for all combinations of signs.
